Off Calendar Mar-09-2015 Continued To Jun-01-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Bridgman for (petitioner & conservator) Katherine Gordon. Lawrence Less for (trustees) Marshall & Christine Scott.

Discussion was held as to the availability of counsel for trial. Mr. Less stated that he just received medical records from Kaiser and would need time for review. Mr. Bridgman reported that the documents from Kaiser were just received despite 3 subpoena's for records but that the records are clear. The matter was referred to the department of the Presiding Judge (206) to be set for trial on June 1, 2015, at 9:30 a.m., (order for the same signed in open court and copies handed to both parties).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Respondents Scott Marshall And Christine Marshall Notice Of Motoin And Motion To Compel Response To Request For Production, Set No. Six, And For Sanctions Against Petitioner And Her Attorney
Off Calendar Sep-03-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Bridgman for (petitioner) Katherine Gordon. Lawrence Less for (respondents & moving parties) Scott & Christine Marshall.

The parties presented oral argument to support their positions regarding the tentative ruling. Mr. Bridgman stated that he has not responded to requests from Mr. Less due to workload, that the financial information being requested is in the second set of interrogatories and that the sanctions were high. Mr. Less stated that he has had to file two motions to get a response, that additional expenses have been requested by the conservatee and that the sanctions were less than the amount requested. Mr. Less provided a proposed order and the two motions to compel responses to requests for production were taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: None. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Nov-04-2013 Continued To Feb-03-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: James Bridgman for Katherine Gordon (Petitioner). Lawrence Less for Scott and Christine Marshall (Respondent).

Mr. Bridgman stated that more discovery is needed and that he agrees to mediation. Mr. Less stated he agreed to Pro Bono Mediation. The Court signed the Minute Order Referring Case to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than January 27, 2014, Counsel must notify Probate Examiner of the status of mediation by January 29, 2014 and Status Conference is set for February 3, 2014 at 9:00 a.m in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition For A Determination That Trust Property Belongs To C.H. Marshall; For Dertermination Of Tr
Off Calendar Aug-26-2013 Continued To Nov-04-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lawrence Less for Respondents.

The Court noted that Mr. Bridgman was not present. Mr. Less stated that they have commenced discovery. The Petition for a Determination that Trust Property Beolongs to C. H. Marshall, etc. was continued to November 4, 2013 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 for status on discovery. The Court ordered that Mr. Bridgman be present at the next hearing and suggested that the Parties consider mediation. Mr. Less will prepare the order.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris. (Not Reported)
